message:
refactor(connector): replace stringly-typed fields with core domain types

Migrate the connector CLI introspection output from string-based
representations to proper fcp_core domain types for improved type
safety and consistency:

types.rs changes:
- Import AgentHint, ApprovalMode, CapabilityId, IdempotencyClass,
  RiskLevel, SafetyTier from fcp_core
- Update OperationSummary to use typed capability, risk_level,
  safety_tier fields
- Update OperationDescriptor to use typed idempotency, ai_hints,
  requires_approval fields
- Remove redundant AgentHintsDescriptor (use fcp_core::AgentHint)

mod.rs changes:
- Update simulate_connector_info() to construct OperationSummary with
  CapabilityId::new(), RiskLevel::*, SafetyTier::* enums
- Update simulate_introspection() to use typed IdempotencyClass::*,
  ApprovalMode::*, and AgentHint struct
- Add helper functions for display: risk_level_label(),
  safety_tier_label(), idempotency_label(), approval_label()
- Update print_info_human_readable() and print_introspection_human_readable()
  to use pattern matching on enum types instead of string comparisons
- Add related capabilities display in introspection output

discovery.rs changes:
- Update connector discovery to use typed fields consistently

This change eliminates stringly-typed bugs where invalid values could
be passed at runtime, now caught at compile time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
